## Summary

Provide a brief description of the problem solved, context background, and what these changes accomplish.

## Changes

- Detailed list of modifications and additions.
- Architecture/configuration changes if applicable.

## Screenshots (Optional)

Include visual screenshots or animations to demonstrate UI/UX updates.

## Testing

Describe the manual or automated validation steps executed to test these changes.
Provide command lines executed:
```bash
npm run type-check
npm run lint
npm run build
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the repository coding standards.
- [ ] TypeScript compilation check returns zero compilation errors.
- [ ] ESLint execution returns zero warnings/errors.
- [ ] Next.js production build runs successfully.
- [ ] Relational schema migrations and Prisma client types are updated (if DB changed).
- [ ] Documentation is updated (CHANGELOG, Roadmap, Walkthrough).
